text: {"claims":[{"statement":"The recipe provides 258 calories, 10 grams total fat, 137 milligrams cholesterol, 465 milligrams sodium, 25 grams carbohydrates, 3 grams fiber, and 17 grams protein per serving.","claimType":"empirical","quote":"Nutritional per serving (3-by-3.5 inch square): 258 calories, 10 grams total fat, 137 milligrams cholesterol, 465 milligrams sodium, 25 grams carbohydrates, 3 grams fiber, 17 grams protein.","entailment":"The quoted line lists the exact amounts of calories, fat, cholesterol, sodium, carbohydrates, fiber, and protein for one serving, directly supporting the nutritional claim.","population":"","intervention":"","comparator":"","outcome":"258 calories, 10 grams total fat, 137 milligrams cholesterol, 465 milligrams sodium, 25 grams carbohydrates, 3 grams fiber, 17 grams protein per serving","timeframe":"","quantifiers":"","modality":"descriptive"},{"statement":"Anne Harguth is a dietitian in Nutrition in Waseca, Minnesota.","claimType":"definitional","quote":"_Anne Harguth is a dietitian in [Nutrition](https://www.mayoclinichealthsystem.org/services-and-treatments/nutrition \"Opens in same window.\") in [Waseca](https://www.mayoclinichealthsystem.org/locations/waseca \"Opens in same window.\"), Minnesota._","entailment":"The quoted sentence explicitly states Anne Harguth’s professional role and location, confirming the claim about her being a dietitian in Nutrition in Waseca, Minnesota.","population":"","intervention":"","comparator":"","outcome":"","timeframe":"","quantifiers":"","modality":"definitional"}]}
